button.label: New Risk Register
button.screentip: Create a new ISO 14971 risk register worksheet
button.supertip: Inserts a pre-structured risk register sheet with all required columns: Hazard ID, Hazard, Hazardous Situation, Harm, Severity (1-5), Probability (1-5), RPN, Risk Level, Acceptability, Risk Control Measure, Residual Severity, Residual Probability, Residual RPN, Residual Level, Verification Method, ISO 14971 Clause, Status.

button.label: Calculate Risk Levels
button.screentip: Auto-calculate RPN and risk acceptability for all rows
button.supertip: Computes RPN = Severity x Probability for every data row. Maps result to ISO 14971 risk matrix: LOW (1-3), MEDIUM (4-8), HIGH (9-15), CRITICAL (16-25). Applies color-coded cell backgrounds.

button.label: Traceability Matrix
button.screentip: Create a Design Traceability Matrix sheet
button.supertip: Inserts a traceability matrix tracing User Needs through Design Inputs, Design Outputs, Verification Methods, Validation Methods, Risk References, and ISO 13485 Stage. Required content for the Design and Development File (DDF).

button.label: Register Workbook
button.screentip: Register this Excel file as a QMS controlled document
button.supertip: Assigns a document ID (RM, DC, or FM type), creates an entry in the document register, and logs the action. Use for risk registers, traceability matrices, and other Excel-based controlled records.

button.label: Risk Documents
button.screentip: List approved Risk Management documents from the QMS register
button.supertip: Queries the DMS server for all effective Risk Management (RM) documents. Requires QMS Desktop App to be running.

button.label: QMS App
button.supertip: Opens the full QMS dashboard for document management, CR tracking, routing, and register viewing.
